title: euphorbia hirta var. typica
intro: Euphorbia hirta var. typica, also known as asthmawort or fetid euphorbia, is a plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. It is traditionally used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as asthma, bronchitis, and coughs, due to its anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating pain, and treating digestive issues. Traditionally, the plant is prepared in herbal teas, infusions, or as a paste to be applied topically, and its medicinal properties have been utilized in various traditional medicine practices worldwide.
